title: Add mobile push notifications
original_text: Implemented push notifications for mobile apps. Integrated Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) for Android. Added Apple Push Notification Service (APNs) for iOS. Implemented notification scheduling and delivery. Added notification grouping and stacking. Implemented rich media notifications with images. Added notification action buttons. Added notification analytics and open tracking. Result: push notifications working on both platforms.
expected_subject: feat(mobile): add push notifications for iOS and Android
expected_body_lines: - Integrate FCM for Android push notifications
- Add APNs for iOS push notifications
- Add notification grouping and rich media
- Validation: push notifications working on both platforms
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(mobile): add push notifications for iOS and Android"
